column1: # The CURATED list of composite clades to report (Script 005, composite_clades).
# A "composite clade" is an EXACT combination of component clades: an annogroup
# belongs to it when its member sequences come from BOTH/ALL and ONLY those
# components. One composite clade per row, written as a comma-delimited list of
# component names. Valid components are the group names defined in the
# Placozoa, Cnidaria, Bilateria) plus the outside label NonMetazoa. Order does not
# matter (the script re-sorts into config order); blank and '#' lines are ignored.
# Each row becomes a composite clade identifier  cc_<components>-exact  and drives:
#   - the Composite_Clade-exact column in 5-output's per-annogroup table
#   - one row in the Composite Clade Annogroup Summary Counts table
#   - one Composite Clade All Annogroup Identifiers and Definitions detail table
# This default set reproduces the earlier metazoan phylum-composition groups (the
# four non-bilaterian phyla, eleven mixed combinations, and their NonMetazoa
# pairs). Edit freely — add any combination of components you are curious about.
# ---- the same fifteen, plus non-metazoan outgroup members ----
